derived_gap_read.profile_tax_read: Dense-linear backward profiling is intrusive: step-2 throughput drops from the prior additive/MORI profile's 125.23 TFLOPs/GPU to 115.23 TFLOPs/GPU, and backward grows from 27.62s to 32.21s. Use this run for attribution only.
derived_gap_read.read: MORI owner VJP plus dX return remains a large target, but the dense/loss sidecars only explain about 4.07s of step-2 wall. The remaining wall is likely dense-fallback attention inner kernels, FSDP/autograd synchronization, and microbatch wrapper/context overhead that requires a torch trace or lower-level phase hooks.

commands.run: RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_flash12_dense_linear_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_steps2_20260606 TARGET_HOST=do-vunguyen-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_MBS=1 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_TORCHTITAN_CONFIG=deepseek_v4_flash_12layer_ceiling_probe_bf16_canary CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_FORWARD_MODE=aiter CANARY_MORI_AITER_SAVE_FORWARD_DISPATCH=true CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=expert_loop CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_OP_CACHE_MODE=backward CANARY_MORI_AITER_DX_RETURN_MODE=sync CANARY_MORI_AITER_XGRAD_MODE=compact CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PERSIST_JIT_CACHE=auto CANARY_ENABLE_PROFILING=false CANARY_PROFILE_DENSE_LINEAR_BACKWARD=true CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/logs/torchtitan_dsv4_flash12_dense_linear_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_steps2_20260606/profile_timing CANARY_DSV4_ADDITIVE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/logs/torchtitan_dsv4_flash12_dense_linear_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_steps2_20260606/additive_timing CANARY_MORI_AITER_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/logs/torchtitan_dsv4_flash12_dense_linear_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_steps2_20260606/mori_timing experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

validation: Remote node readiness checked with df and rocm-smi before running.
Run completed two optimizer steps with finite loss and grad norm.
Profile timing sidecars wrote 6976 dense/loss records per rank; step-2 parse kept records with call_id > 3488.
MORI/AITER timing sidecars wrote 1536 records per rank; step-2 parse kept records with call_id > 768.
Raw logs and JSONL sidecars remain outside the repo under /scratch; this file is the compact persisted summary.
next_actions: Run one short same-shape torch-profiler pass, or add lower-level hooks, to split the remaining backward-minus-MORI-minus-dense wall into dense inner attention, FSDP communication/synchronization, and wrapper/autograd overhead.
Continue MORI/MoE production path toward fused grouped owner-rank training backward; owner VJP plus dX return is still about 8.22s of the profiled step-2 wall.
Treat dense-linear profile throughput as diagnostic only because the custom autograd timing wrapper adds measurable overhead.
